channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lampost not fully upright, 16th May
item.description:
I'll swear this lamppost is leaning. It's the one outside #39

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reddons Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed, 16th May
item.description:
Saw this last night 16/5/26, I’m assuming it’s still there it’s a regular spot for fly tipping unfortunately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arnsberg Way, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Decapitated fox - cub., 16th May
item.description:
In the doubled black bags is what I think is a decapitated cub fox. It is located on the pavement, just next to the tree which is opposite 94 Buchan Road, London SE15 3HG. After speaking with The Fox Project Southern Wildlife Ambulance Service I was advised to double bag the dead animal and place it on the street and report it for collection. This animal was found yesterday and reported, however, due to time of report there was no collection yestetday or today so I was advised today to do the above.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buchan Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car left in residents parking for a ling period, 16th May
item.description:
White citroen taking up residents car spaces. not taxed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenhaven Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pothole just after the turning, 16th May
item.description:
Getting bigger very quick

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Second abandoned vehicle blocking public/residential bay, 16th May
item.description:
There is a second vehicle in the same location which also appears to be abandoned. Together, these vehicles are blocking a bay that is used by residents for reversing and by the public accessing the nearby green/park area. This is reducing safe manoeuvring space and preventing normal public/residential use of the bay. Please could this second vehicle also be investigated and removed if confirmed abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large bag of rubbish, 16th May
item.description:
Blocking pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kentmere Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle blocking residential parking bay, 16th May
item.description:
There appears to be an abandoned vehicle using a residential parking bay on this street. This bay is regularly used by residents when reversing out of the road and by visitors accessing the nearby green/park area to walk their dogs. The vehicle is effectively blocking the bay and creating difficulty for residents and visitors. Please could this be investigated and removed if it is confirmed to be abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped screens and exercise ball, 16th May
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-44, Copeland Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please put more dog waste signs on every corner of The Gardens, 16th May
item.description:
This has become a prolific place for night time dog walkers to not clear up their mess
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Kelmore Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A lot of dump rubbish in a broken bags, 16th May
item.description:
People left a rubbish bags and I assume foxes broke them. Now all rubbish is on a street just literally at the entrance of the Russia Dock Woodland.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downtown Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple large dog poos all around The Gardens, 16th May
item.description:
I could count at least 10.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, The Gardens, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 nitrous oxide canisters outside 32 Keynsham Road, 16th May
item.description:
Nitrous oxide canisters on the pavement by the side of the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keynsham Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items fly tipped, 16th May
item.description:
A large number of household items have been fly tipped. It happens a lot with 2 Cricketfield Rd, residents seem to just dump they're unwanted stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
